text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen. The climax of the
racing year, and of Tokai Teio's career.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's finally here, Trainer. My showdown with Prez.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She's who I look up to the most. No matter what
happens, this race won't change that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The one thing that will change is what my fans
think of me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
They'll be like, "Tokai Teio is the best
Umamusume of them all!"

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you know I will! The crowd's cheers at the
end of the race will be for me alone!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Here I go, Trainer. Don't let me out of your
sight!
